CREATE TABLE MailAttachments (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, data VARCHAR(255));
SELECT uuvalidate(data, 0) FROM MailAttachments WHERE data IS NOT NULL;
SELECT uuvalidate(data, 1) FROM MailAttachments WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM MailAttachments WHERE data LIKE '%9XE%');
SELECT uuvalidate(data, 0) AS validated_data FROM MailAttachments ORDER BY validated_data DESC;
SELECT uuvalidate(CONCAT(data, ':extra'), 0) FROM MailAttachments WHERE data IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE ValidationResults (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, result VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO ValidationResults (result) SELECT uuvalidate(data, 0) FROM MailAttachments;
SELECT a.id, uuvalidate(a.data, 0) as validated_data, b.result FROM MailAttachments a JOIN ValidationResults b ON a.id = b.id WHERE b.result IS NOT NULL;
SELECT uuvalidate(data, 0) FROM (SELECT data FROM MailAttachments WHERE LENGTH(data) <= 100) AS subquery;
SELECT uuvalidate(data, NULL) FROM MailAttachments WHERE data = '';
SELECT uuvalidate(data, 0) FROM MailAttachments WHERE data NOT LIKE '%invalid%';
SELECT a.data, b.result FROM MailAttachments a LEFT JOIN (SELECT result FROM ValidationResults) b ON a.data = b.result WHERE b.result IS NULL;
